slides.title: Terminology for Energy Efficiency  Network Management
Update on YANG base model -- Benoit Claise -- Jan Lindblad
A YANG Data Model for Reporting Utilization Scores in ISAC

polls.text: Should the base network controller model be scoped to include more than just power/energy attributes?
Have you read/reviewed any version of the PETRA draft (draft-petra-green-api)?
Do you think that the WG should adopt the petra draft at this time?
Have you read/reviewed any version of the ISAC Utilization Draft (draft-jadoon-green-isac-utilization)?

chat.author: Robert Wilton
chat.text: Please can you help collect and check notes, especially if you make comments or ask questions.

chat.author: Benoît Claise
chat.text: On the use case draft, so far, you told us it will not be published, so we stop investing time trying to improve it. If the situation has changed, let us know

chat.author: Robert Wilton
chat.text: @Benoit, understood.  I don't think that we need to publish it.  The thing that I want to check is to ensure that the WG agrees that the right use cases are covered and understood.

chat.author: Tony Li
chat.text: My friends call me Tony. Only the TSA, IRS, and my enemies use Anthony.

chat.author: Robert Wilton
chat.text: My comment to Diego on the previous slide was that was terrible wiring :-)

chat.author: Diego Lopez
chat.text: And my reply was that it shows it is a real lab...

chat.author: David Slik
chat.text: If the PDU is measuring AC input to the router, and the router is measuring the DC output of the router power supply, that would explain the 6% discrepency.
